extortion.description: Wangkanai Group sugar business started in 1975 with the establishment of Wangkanai Sugar Co., Ltd. in Wangkanai Sub-district, Kanchanaburi Province. Wangkanai Group is currently one of Thailand’s largestsugar producers. Wangkanai Group is now the nation’s leading sugar producer, supplying raw sugar, white sugar, refined sugar, natural sugar, caramelized sugar and brown sugar to the local and global markets, with a total production capacity of approximately 100,000 tons of sugar cane daily.
